text: Based on the body language and tone I actually took this scene as the first instance of Real Nikki conflicting with Wish Nikki. text: She gets nervous there because some part of her knows about the wish — confirmed in the poem and after she kills Sarah. text: The intent is that Bear has just been woken up in the dark and his brain is filling in the details but getting them wrong.
